reasoning: The document displays high content fidelity with a composite score of 0.918 and near-perfect programmatic shingling recall (0.989) and precision (0.988). Although minor structural issues exist regarding heading hierarchies and list flattening, the content is fully preserved and the defects are classified as non-blocking cosmetic issues according to the routing instructions.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent and contains logical breaks. Major sections (1-9) are treated differently: sections 1-3 are paragraphs, section 4 is an H4, and sections 5-9 are H2. This creates a broken hierarchy where H4 (Item 4) is followed immediately by H2 (Item 5), skipping levels and misrepresenting the relationship between peer items.
